name: Wanjia Social Responsibility 18-month Regular Open Mixed Fund
summary: Wanjia Social Responsibility 18-month Regular Open Mixed Fund is a mixed fund with an 18-month regular open period, investing in both stocks and bonds with a focus on social responsibility. The fund aims to achieve long-term capital appreciation while considering environmental, social, and governance (ESG) factors in its investment decisions. It is managed by Wanjia Asset Management Co., Ltd., based in China.
